description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered, industrial appearance. The exterior is primarily gray with visible vertical seams and significant rust and grime, especially near the top and bottom edges. A prominent yellow and black radioactive warning symbol is displayed on one side, indicating hazardous contents. The top and bottom rims are reinforced with a rusty, orange-brown band, suggesting additional structural support. The surface is mottled with stains and corrosion, giving it an aged, neglected look typical of barrels found in restricted or hazardous urban environments. There are no visible handles or openings, and the top appears to be sealed.
description: A weathered, gray metal barrel with rusted bands and a radioactive warning symbol, showing heavy grime and corrosion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the radioactive warning symbol and the most prominent rust and grime on the upper rim.
description_view_1: Side view with partial visibility of the warning symbol and extensive surface stains and rust.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible markings, dominated by dark stains and heavy corrosion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no symbols, showing a relatively cleaner but still stained and rusted surface.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: rusted metal bands at top and bottom
